name: MacBook Air M4
tagline: Best overall laptop with unmatched efficiency
description: The MacBook Air M4 combines incredible performance with fanless silence and all-day battery life.
longDescription: MacBook Air M4 is our best overall laptop with unmatched efficiency. Apple's latest ultraportable redefines what a thin-and-light laptop can do. The M4 chip delivers performance that rivals much larger machines while the fanless design ensures complete silence.

keyFeatures.description: Best overall laptop with unmatched efficiency

verdict: MacBook Air M4 is our top recommendation for overall laptop with unmatched efficiency. M4 chip delivers desktop-class performance. Limited to two external displays.

faqs.answer: The MacBook Air M4 combines incredible performance with fanless silence and all-day battery life.

faqs.question: Is the MacBook Air M4 worth the price?
faqs.answer: Yes, the MacBook Air M4 justifies its price with m4 chip delivers desktop-class performance. We recommend it for users who prioritize overall laptop.
